title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at FreeCharge

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at FreeCharge
jsonLd.description:
We at FreeCharge are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About FreeCharge:
FreeCharge is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreeCharge!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
